notes: Aimpoint Acro P-2 ships with a 3.5 MOA dot; closest LoadOut archetype is the 2 MOA red dot (catalog does not include a 3.5 MOA archetype).
Aimpoint CompM4s ships with a 2 MOA dot — exact match to loadout_red_dot_2moa.
Aimpoint CompM5 ships with a 2 MOA dot — exact match to loadout_red_dot_2moa. Carried forward from prior mapping.
Aimpoint CompM5s ships with a 2 MOA dot — exact match to loadout_red_dot_2moa.
Aimpoint Micro H-2 ships with a 2 MOA dot — exact match to loadout_red_dot_2moa.
Aimpoint Micro T-2 ships with a 2 MOA dot — exact match to loadout_red_dot_2moa.
Aimpoint PRO ships with a 2 MOA dot — exact match to loadout_red_dot_2moa.
Arken EP5 ships in mil + MOA tactical Christmas-tree variants. Default mapping to mil tree medium (most-sold variant). Carried forward from prior mapping.
Arken SH4 ships in mil + MOA tactical Christmas-tree variants. Default mapping to mil tree medium. Carried forward from prior mapping.
Athlon Ares BTR Gen2 ships with APRS3 MIL (mil hash without dense Christmas tree) — maps to loadout_mil_hash per audit.
Athlon Ares ETR UHD ships with APRS3 MIL — maps to loadout_mil_hash per audit.

Athlon Argos BTR Gen2 ships in BOTH APMR2 MIL and APMR2 MOA variants. Per Appendix G #16 (LoadOut v2.3 brief), the MOA variant is the canonical reference reticle; the flaring MOA tree (`loadout_moa_tree_flare`) is the §7.3 launch-blocker target. Phase 5 mapping correction: was `loadout_mil_hash`.
Athlon Cronus BTR (original) ships with APRS1 MIL — maps to loadout_mil_hash per audit.
Drift fix: Athlon Cronus BTR Gen2 ships with the APRS6 MIL flaring Christmas tree — re-mapped from loadout_mil_tree_dense to loadout_mil_tree_flare per Appendix J.
Athlon Helos BTR Gen2 ships with APRS6 MIL (compact scope, hash style without dense Christmas tree on this small magnification range) — maps to loadout_mil_hash per audit.
Athlon Midas BTR Gen2 ships with APRS3 MIL — maps to loadout_mil_hash per audit.
Athlon Midas TAC HD ships with APRS3 MIL — maps to loadout_mil_hash per audit.

Burris Eliminator 6 X96 is a rangefinding hunting reticle with a dot-on-a-vertical-ladder BDC. Closest LoadOut archetype is the SFP hunting BDC; the X96 ladder pattern is unique to Burris and has no exact LoadOut equivalent (manual_research fallback).
Burris Fullfield IV ships with Ballistic Plex E1 — SFP hunting BDC plex variant maps to loadout_hunting_bdc per README pattern table.
Burris Fullfield IV 4-16x50 ships with E3 / Ballistic Plex E1; both are SFP hunting BDC plex variants that map to loadout_hunting_bdc.
Burris Veracity PH ships with the PEK mil-hash FFP reticle — maps to loadout_mil_hash per audit.
Burris Veracity PH 4-20x50 ships with PEK / Wind MOA. Default to PEK mil-hash (loadout_mil_hash) per audit.
Burris XTR III 3.3-18x50 ships with SCR 2 MIL (FFP mil hash without dense Christmas tree) — maps to loadout_mil_hash per audit.

Burris XTR III 5.5-30x56 ships in BOTH SCR2 MIL and SCR2 MOA variants. Per Appendix G #15 (LoadOut v2.3 brief), the MOA variant is the canonical reference reticle; the flaring MOA tree (`loadout_moa_tree_flare`) is the §7.3 launch-blocker target. Phase 5 mapping correction: was `loadout_mil_tree_medium`.
Burris XTR Pro ships with the SCR 2 MIL plus a Tremor3 option — the Tremor3-class flaring Christmas tree maps to loadout_mil_tree_flare per the audit's NEW-reticle classification.
Bushnell Elite Tactical DMR3 ships with the G3 MIL / EQL flaring Christmas-tree reticles — maps to loadout_mil_tree_flare per the audit's NEW-reticle classification.
Bushnell Elite Tactical XRS3 ships with the G4P MIL reticle — FFP mil hash without flaring tree, maps to loadout_mil_hash per audit.
Bushnell Engage 3-9x40 ships with Deploy MOA — SFP MOA hash maps to loadout_moa_hash per audit.
Bushnell Engage 4-16x44 ships with Deploy MOA — SFP MOA hash maps to loadout_moa_hash per audit.
Bushnell Forge 4.5-27x50 ships with Deploy MOA — SFP MOA hash maps to loadout_moa_hash per audit.
Bushnell Match Pro 6-24x50 ships with Deploy MIL — FFP mil hash maps to loadout_mil_hash per audit.
Bushnell Match Pro ED 5-30x56 ships with the DM2 MIL Christmas-tree reticle. Default to loadout_mil_tree_medium (carried forward); DM2 is a uniform-grid tree, not the modern flaring variant.
Zeiss Conquest V4 ships with a Plex or ZBR-1 (mil hash) — default to pd_plex (most-sold variant for hunting) per audit.
Zeiss Conquest V4 6-24x50 ships with ZBR-1 (mil hash) or ZMOAi — default to loadout_mil_hash per audit (long-range tactical variant).
Zeiss Conquest V6 ships with ZBi (mil hash) or ZMOA — default to loadout_mil_hash per audit.
Zeiss LRP S3 4-25x50 ships with ZF-MRi (mil) or ZF-MOAi — default to loadout_mil_hash per audit; ZF-MRi is FFP mil hash without flaring tree.
Zeiss LRP S3 6-36x56 ships with ZF-MRi (mil hash) — maps to loadout_mil_hash per audit.
Zeiss LRP S5 3.6-18x50 ships with ZF-MRi (mil hash) / ZF-MOAi — maps to loadout_mil_hash per audit.

Zeiss LRP S5 5-25x56 ships in mil + MOA tactical Christmas-tree variants. Default to loadout_mil_tree_medium (carried forward from prior mapping); ZF-MRi on this larger scope is a uniform-grid tree, not the modern flaring variant.

Zeiss Victory V8 2.8-20x56 ships with the 60 / ASV illuminated dot-in-ring style hunting reticle — closest LoadOut archetype is loadout_holographic_ring per audit (manual_research fallback; the ASV is a Zeiss-specific elevation-turret-paired reticle without a clean LoadOut equivalent).
Zeiss Victory V8 4.8-35x60 ships with a Plex-style hunting reticle — maps to pd_plex per audit. Carried forward from prior mapping.
March FX 4.5-28x52 FFP Tactical ships in switchable mil-tree variants. Default to loadout_mil_tree_medium (carried forward from prior mapping).
March X 5-50x56 SFP Tactical ships with high-magnification MOA reticles — maps to loadout_moa_hash. Carried forward from prior mapping.
EOTech 512 ships with the 65 MOA Ring + 1 MOA Dot holographic reticle — maps to loadout_holographic_ring per audit.
EOTech EXPS3-0 ships with the 68 MOA Ring + 1 MOA Dot holographic reticle — maps to loadout_holographic_ring per audit.
EOTech Vudu 1-6x24 FFP ships with HC3 (segmented BDC), SR1, or SR2. Default to loadout_mil_hash; the SR1/SR2 are FFP mil hashes (HC3 has no clean LoadOut equivalent, manual_research fallback).
EOTech Vudu 5-25x50 FFP ships with H59 (LoadOut interoperability calibration), MD3, or MD4. Default to loadout_mil_tree_flare for the H59-class flaring Christmas tree per audit.
EOTech XPS2-0 ships with the 68 MOA Ring + 1 MOA Dot holographic reticle — maps to loadout_holographic_ring per audit.
EOTech XPS3-0 ships with the 68 MOA Ring + 1 MOA Dot holographic reticle — maps to loadout_holographic_ring. Carried forward from prior mapping.
Element Optics Helix 6-24x50 FFP ships in mil + MOA tactical variants with uniform-grid Christmas tree — maps to loadout_mil_tree_medium. Carried forward from prior mapping.
Hawke Endurance 30 ships with the LR Dot illuminated dot-in-ring reticle — maps to loadout_holographic_ring per audit.
Hawke Frontier 30 SF 5-30x56 ships with Mil Pro or MOA Pro — default to loadout_mil_hash per audit (FFP mil hash variant).
Hawke Frontier 34 FFP ships with MOA Pro Ext or Mil Pro Ext — default to loadout_mil_hash per audit.

Hawke Sidewinder 30 FFP ships with MOA or Half Mil reticles (manual_research per audit). Default to loadout_mil_hash as the closest generic FFP mil hash archetype; the Half Mil pattern is a fine-graduation mil hash without flaring tree.
Hawke Vantage 4-12x50 AO ships with a Mil Dot reticle — maps to pd_mil_dot_usmc (public-domain USMC mil dot) per audit.

Hensoldt ZF 4-16x56 ships in switchable Hensoldt mil reticle variants. Default to loadout_mil_tree_medium (carried forward from prior mapping); the smaller-magnification ZF body doesn't ship with the dense SKMR3 flaring tree variant — that's the bigger 6-24x72 ZF.

Hensoldt ZF 6-24x72 ships with SKMR3 / ABM / FFP mil tree variants. Default to loadout_mil_tree_medium (carried forward from prior mapping); the SKMR3 is closer to a uniform-grid tree than the modern flaring variants like EBR-7D, so loadout_mil_tree_medium is the better archetype match.
Holosun AEMS ships with selectable 2 MOA Dot / 65 MOA Ring. Default to loadout_red_dot_2moa (primary aiming dot) per audit.
Holosun AEMS Core ships with a 2 MOA Dot — exact match to loadout_red_dot_2moa per audit.
Holosun HE509T ships with a multi-reticle circle-and-dot pattern — maps to loadout_red_dot_circle. Carried forward from prior mapping.
Holosun HE509T-RD X2 ships with 2 MOA Dot / 32 MOA Ring. Default to loadout_red_dot_2moa (primary aiming dot) per audit.

Holosun HM3X is a passive 3x magnifier with no native reticle — it inherits whatever red dot it's paired with. Default to loadout_red_dot_2moa as the most common pairing partner (manual_research fallback; the magnifier itself has no stock reticle).
Holosun HS503CU ships with 2 MOA Dot / 65 MOA Ring. Default to loadout_red_dot_2moa per audit.

Holosun HS510C ships with 65 MOA circle + 2 MOA dot — maps to loadout_holographic_ring per Appendix G #35 (LoadOut v2.3 brief). Circle-dot reflex; the ring is the canonical holographic-style read. Phase 5 mapping correction: was `loadout_red_dot_2moa`.

Kahles K318i ships in switchable SKMR3 / MSR / SKMR4 variants. Default to loadout_mil_tree_medium (carried forward from prior mapping); the K318i body is more compact than the K525i/K624i and ships predominantly with uniform-grid trees, not the modern flaring variants.

Kahles K525i ships in switchable SKMR3 / MSR2 / SKMR4 variants. Default to loadout_mil_tree_medium (carried forward from prior mapping); the SKMR3/4 are uniform-grid trees rather than the modern flaring variants like EBR-7D.

Kahles K624i 6-24x56 ships with SKMR3 / MSR. The K624i is the long-range tactical model in the Kahles lineup; per audit, the SKMR3-class flaring Christmas tree on this body maps to loadout_mil_tree_flare.
Leupold Mark 4HD 2.5-10x42 ships with FFP TMR — FFP mil hash maps to loadout_mil_hash per audit.
Leupold Mark 4HD 4.5-18x52 M5C3 FFP ships in switchable mil + MOA Christmas-tree variants. Default to loadout_mil_tree_medium (carried forward from prior mapping).
Leupold Mark 4HD 6-24x52 ships with PR2-MIL / PR1-MOA — FFP mil hash maps to loadout_mil_hash per audit.
Leupold Mark 5HD 3.6-18x44 ships with PR1-MIL / TMR — both FFP mil hashes without flaring tree, maps to loadout_mil_hash per audit.

Leupold Mark 5HD 5-25x56 M5C3 FFP ships in switchable mil + MOA Christmas-tree variants (PR1-MIL, TMR, H59 calibrated). Default to loadout_mil_tree_medium (carried forward from prior mapping); the PR1-MIL is a uniform-grid tree rather than the modern flaring variant.

Leupold Mark 5HD 7-35x56 ships with PR2-MOA / TMR / H59 (LoadOut interoperability calibration). Default to loadout_mil_tree_flare for the H59-class flaring Christmas tree per audit + Appendix G top-35 verification set (#14 TMOA-HD).
Leupold VX-3HD 3.5-10x40 ships with Duplex or CDS-ZL. Default to pd_plex (most-sold variant; SFP hunting plex) per audit.
Leupold VX-3HD 4.5-14x40 ships with Duplex or CDS-ZL. Default to pd_plex (most-sold variant) per audit.

Leupold VX-5HD 3-15x44 CDS-ZL2 ships with Duplex / FireDot Duplex. Default to pd_plex (most-sold variant; SFP hunting duplex). Prior mapping had loadout_moa_hash as default but pd_plex is the more accurate archetype for the Duplex stock reticle.
Leupold VX-5HD 4-20x52 ships with Boone & Crockett (SFP hunting BDC) / TMOA. Default to loadout_hunting_bdc per audit.
Leupold VX-6HD 2-12x42 ships with FireDot Duplex — SFP hunting duplex maps to pd_plex per audit + Appendix G top-35 verification set (#24).

Leupold VX-6HD 3-18x44 ships with FireDot 4 — illuminated 4-dot reticle. Closest LoadOut archetype is loadout_red_dot_2moa per audit (manual_research fallback; the FireDot 4 lacks a clean LoadOut equivalent).
Leupold VX-Freedom 3-9x40 ships with Duplex — SFP hunting duplex maps to pd_plex per audit.
Leupold VX-Freedom 4-12x40 ships with Tri-MOA — SFP MOA hash maps to loadout_moa_hash per audit.
Maven RS.1 ships with SHR-MOA / CSHR — SFP MOA hash variants map to loadout_moa_hash per audit.
Maven RS.2 ships with CSHR — SFP MOA hash maps to loadout_moa_hash per audit.
Maven RS.3 ships with MOA-1/2 or MIL-1/2 hash variants. Default to loadout_moa_hash (MOA is the primary US-market variant) per audit.
Maven RS.4 ships with MOA-2 / MIL-2 — FFP hash variants. Default to loadout_moa_hash per audit.
Maven RS.5 ships with CFR-MIL / CFR-MOA. Default to loadout_mil_hash per audit (mil is RS.5's headline variant).

Meopta Optika6 4.5-27x50 RD FFP ships in switchable mil Christmas-tree variants. Default to loadout_mil_tree_compact (carried forward from prior mapping); the Optika6 tree is compact relative to the dense/medium variants.
Meopta Optika6 5-30x56 RD FFP ships in mil Christmas-tree variants. Default to loadout_mil_tree_compact (carried forward from prior mapping).
Nightforce ATACR 1-8x24 F1 ships with FC-Mil / FC-DMx (LPVO mil hash). Default to loadout_mil_hash per audit; FC-Mil is FFP mil hash without dense tree.

Nightforce ATACR 4-16x42 F1 ships in switchable MIL-R / MOAR variants. Default to loadout_mil_tree_dense (carried forward from prior mapping); the MIL-R is a denser uniform-grid Christmas tree distinct from the modern flaring MIL-XT used on the larger ATACR bodies.

Nightforce ATACR 5-25x56 F1 ships with MIL-XT / TReMoR3 / H59 (LoadOut interoperability calibration). All three are modern flaring Christmas trees — maps to loadout_mil_tree_flare per audit + Appendix G top-35 verification set (#12 MOAR-T equivalent).
Drift fix: Nightforce ATACR 7-35x56 F1 ships with MIL-XT / Mil-C — re-mapped from loadout_mil_tree_dense to loadout_mil_tree_flare per Appendix J + Appendix G top-35 verification set (#4 MIL-XT).
Nightforce BEAST 5-25x56 F1 ships with H59 (LoadOut interoperability calibration) / MIL-R / TReMoR2. Default to loadout_mil_tree_flare per audit for the H59-class flaring Christmas tree.
Nightforce NX8 1-8x24 F1 ships with FC-Mil / FC-DMx (LPVO mil hash). Default to loadout_mil_hash per audit.
Nightforce NX8 2.5-20x50 F1 ships with MIL-XT — modern flaring Christmas tree maps to loadout_mil_tree_flare per audit.
Drift fix: Nightforce NX8 4-32x50 F1 ships with MIL-XT / Mil-C — re-mapped from loadout_mil_tree_dense to loadout_mil_tree_flare per Appendix J + Appendix G top-35 verification set (#5 Mil-C).
Nightforce NXS 3.5-15x50 ships with MOAR / MIL-R (SFP). Default to loadout_moa_hash per audit; MOAR is the primary US-market variant.
Nightforce NXS 5.5-22x56 ships with MOAR / MIL-R (SFP). Default to loadout_moa_hash per audit.
Nightforce SHV 4-14x56 ships with MOAR or IHR (SFP hunting). Default to loadout_moa_hash per audit (MOAR is the tactical variant).
Nightforce SHV 5-20x56 ships with MOAR / IHR — maps to loadout_sfp_moa_drop (SFP MOA-drop hunting/tactical hybrid). Carried forward from prior mapping.

Primary Arms GLx 1-6x24 ships with ACSS Raptor. Per CLAUDE.md §30, the ACSS-trademarked reticle is not surfaced; maps to LoadOut-original loadout_sfp_lpvo_chevron (SFP LPVO chevron with BDC ladder) per audit.
Primary Arms GLx 2.5-10x44 ships with ACSS Griffin Mil. Per CLAUDE.md §30, maps to LoadOut-original loadout_sfp_lpvo_chevron per audit.
Primary Arms GLx 4-16x50 FFP ships with ACSS Athena BPR / Apollo (FFP variants). Per CLAUDE.md §30, maps to LoadOut-original loadout_combat_bdc per audit. Carried forward from prior mapping.
Primary Arms PLx 1-8x24 FFP ships with ACSS Raptor M8 / Griffin. Per CLAUDE.md §30, maps to LoadOut-original loadout_sfp_lpvo_chevron per audit.
Primary Arms PLx 6-30x56 FFP ships with ACSS Apollo / Athena BPR (FFP flaring Christmas tree). Per CLAUDE.md §30, maps to LoadOut-original loadout_mil_tree_flare per audit.
Primary Arms SLx 1-6x24 Gen IV ships with ACSS Raptor / Griffin. Per CLAUDE.md §30, maps to LoadOut-original loadout_sfp_lpvo_chevron per audit.
Primary Arms SLx 1-8x24 ships with ACSS Raptor M8. Per CLAUDE.md §30, maps to LoadOut-original loadout_sfp_lpvo_chevron per audit.
Primary Arms SLx 4-14x44 FFP ships with ACSS HUD DMR. Per CLAUDE.md §30, maps to LoadOut-original loadout_dmr_bdc per audit. Carried forward from prior mapping.
Riton 5 Conquer 5-25x56 FFP ships in switchable mil + MOA Christmas-tree variants. Default to loadout_mil_tree_medium (carried forward from prior mapping).
Riton 7 Conquer 4-32x56 FFP ships in switchable mil + MOA Christmas-tree variants. Default to loadout_mil_tree_medium (carried forward from prior mapping).
Riton X3 Primal ships with OSR — SFP mil hash variant maps to loadout_mil_hash per audit.
Riton X5 Conquer 5-25x50 ships with PSR Mil / PSR MOA. Default to loadout_mil_hash per audit (PSR Mil is the primary tactical variant; FFP mil hash without dense tree).
Riton X7 Conquer 3-24x50 ships with PSR Mil — FFP mil hash maps to loadout_mil_hash per audit.
Riton X7 Conquer 5-25x56 ships with PSR Mil / PSR MOA. Default to loadout_mil_hash per audit.

Schmidt & Bender Klassik 8x56 ships with L7 / A8 — both are European hunting reticles (manual_research per audit). Default to pd_german_4 as the closest public-domain bold-European-hunting archetype; the L7 and A8 are S&B-specific stadia patterns without exact LoadOut equivalents.
S&B PM II 1-8x24 ships with CQB1 / FlashDot — SFP LPVO combat reticle maps to loadout_combat per audit.
S&B PM II 3-20x50 standard-length variant. Same default reticle as the Ultra Short variant (P4F/H59 family → loadout_mil_tree_flare).

S&B PM II 3-20x50 Ultra Short ships with P4F / H59 / Tremor3 (LoadOut interoperability calibration). All three are modern flaring Christmas trees — maps to loadout_mil_tree_flare per audit + Appendix G top-35 verification set (#7 GR2ID-class).
S&B PM II 5-25x56 ships with H2CMR / P4F / Tremor3. Default to loadout_mil_tree_flare per audit + Appendix G top-35 verification set (#6 H-59).
S&B PM II 5-45x56 ships with GR2ID / Tremor3 / MSR2. All three are modern flaring Christmas trees — maps to loadout_mil_tree_flare per audit.

Schmidt & Bender Polar T96 3-20x50 ships with D7 / L7 — European hunting reticles (manual_research per audit). Default to pd_german_4 as the closest archetype; D7 is a duplex-style hunting cross, L7 is a bold European stadia.
S&B Stratos 1.5-8x42 ships with FlashDot L7 — illuminated dot-in-stadia hunting reticle. Closest LoadOut archetype is loadout_holographic_ring per audit (manual_research fallback).
S&B Stratos 2.5-13x56 ships with L7 / A8 — European hunting reticles (manual_research per audit). Default to pd_german_4 as the closest bold-European-hunting archetype.
Sig Sierra10 BDX 5-50x56 ships with BDX-R3 Digital — SFP digital BDC drop reticle maps to loadout_sfp_moa_drop per audit + Appendix G top-35 verification set (#19 BDX-R1).
Sig Sierra3 BDX 4.5-14x44 ships with BDX-R1 Digital — SFP digital BDC drop reticle maps to loadout_sfp_moa_drop per audit + Appendix G top-35 verification set (#19).
Sig Sierra6 BDX 5-30x56 ships with MOA Milling — FFP MOA hash maps to loadout_moa_hash per audit.

Sig Tango4 6-24x50 ships in BOTH MRAD Milling 2.0 (mil) and MOA Milling variants. Per Appendix G #17 (LoadOut v2.3 brief), the MOA variant is the canonical reference reticle; the flaring MOA tree (`loadout_moa_tree_flare`) is the §7.3 launch-blocker target. Phase 5 mapping correction: was `loadout_mil_hash`.
Sig Tango6 5-30x56 ships with MOA Milling 2.0 — FFP MOA hash maps to loadout_moa_hash per audit.
Sig Tango6T 1-6x24 ships with DWLR556 / Hellfire — SFP LPVO BDC maps to loadout_dmr_bdc per audit. Carried forward from prior mapping.

Sig Tango6T DEV-L 5-30x56 ships with the DEV-L tactical mil tree — flaring-branch variant per Sig's published spec. Phase 5 §7.3 launch-blocker remap: was `loadout_mil_tree_dense` (uniform grid) which would have failed the §7.3 launch-blocker check for FFP tactical. Updated to the canonical flaring tree per Appendix G top-35 verification.
Sig Tango8 1-8x28 ships with DWLR-MOA / DWLR8 MIL. Default to loadout_mil_hash per audit (mil variant is primary).
Sig Whiskey3 4-12x40 ships with Quadplex — SFP hunting plex maps to pd_plex per audit.
Sig Whiskey5 3-15x44 ships with HellFire MOA Milling — SFP MOA hash maps to loadout_moa_hash per audit.
Sightron SIII PLR 6-24x50 FFP Zero Stop ships in switchable mil + MOA variants. Default to loadout_mil_hash (carried forward from prior mapping); FFP mil hash without dense tree.
Sightron SVIII 5-40x56 FFP ED IR Zero Stop ships in mil tactical Christmas-tree variants. Default to loadout_mil_tree_medium (carried forward from prior mapping).
Steiner M5Xi 5-25x56 ships with MSR / MSR2 / SCR. The MSR2 is a modern flaring Christmas tree — maps to loadout_mil_tree_flare per audit.
Steiner M7Xi 4-28x56 ships with MSR / MSR2 — the MSR2 is a modern flaring Christmas tree, maps to loadout_mil_tree_flare per audit.
Steiner P4Xi 1-4x24 ships with P3TR — SFP LPVO mil hash maps to loadout_mil_hash per audit.
Steiner P4Xi 4-16x56 ships with SCR-Mil / Plex S1. Default to loadout_mil_hash per audit (SCR-Mil is the primary tactical variant).
Steiner T6Xi 3-18x56 ships with MSR2 / SCR — MSR2 is a modern flaring Christmas tree, maps to loadout_mil_tree_flare per audit.
Steiner T6Xi 5-30x56 ships with MSR2 / SCR — MSR2 is a modern flaring Christmas tree, maps to loadout_mil_tree_flare per audit.
Swarovski X5(i) 5-25x56 P ships in switchable mil + BDC hunting variants. Default to loadout_mil_tree_medium (carried forward from prior mapping).

Swarovski X5i 3.5-18x50 ships with 4WX / 4WXi — both are Swarovski-specific stadia hunting reticles (manual_research per audit). Default to pd_plex as the closest public-domain hunting-duplex archetype; 4WX is a bold-stadia plex variant.
Swarovski X5i 5-25x56 ships with 4WX / 4WXi / BRH. Default to loadout_moa_hash per audit; the BRH is a hash-based long-range hunting variant.
Swarovski Z6i 2.5-15x56 P (Gen 2) ships with hunting-style reticles. Default to pd_plex (most-sold variant) per audit. Carried forward from prior mapping.
Swarovski Z8i 1-8x24 ships with BRT-I — SFP LPVO MOA hash maps to loadout_moa_hash per audit.
Swarovski Z8i 2-16x50 ships with 4A-IF / BRX-I. Default to loadout_moa_hash per audit (BRX-I is a hash-based long-range hunting variant).

Swarovski dS Gen II 5-25x52 ships with a Smart digital reticle that overlays a holdover dot based on integrated ballistics (manual_research per audit). Closest LoadOut archetype is loadout_holographic_ring; the digital smart reticle has no direct LoadOut equivalent and the holographic ring archetype best captures the simple-dot aiming model the dS presents.
Tangent Theta TT315M 3-15x50 ships in switchable mil tactical Christmas-tree variants. Default to loadout_mil_tree_medium (carried forward from prior mapping).

Tangent Theta TT525P 5-25x56 ships with Gen-2 XR Mil — a modern flaring Christmas tree per Appendix G top-35 verification set (#9). Re-mapped from the prior loadout_mil_tree_medium to loadout_mil_tree_flare to match the actual reticle pattern.
Trijicon ACOG TA02 4x32 LED ships with the LED Chevron BDC. Per CLAUDE.md §30, maps to LoadOut-original loadout_sfp_lpvo_chevron per audit + Appendix G top-35 verification set (#30 BAC Triangle).

Trijicon ACOG TA31 4x32 ships with the BAC Tritium / Fiber Chevron — the canonical chevron reticle. Phase 5 mapping correction: was `loadout_combat` (a generic SFP combat archetype) but the BAC IS the chevron variant. Updated to `loadout_sfp_lpvo_chevron` per Appendix G #30 of the LoadOut v2.3 brief.
Trijicon ACOG TA31F 4x32 ships with the Tritium/Fiber Chevron BDC. Per CLAUDE.md §30, maps to LoadOut-original loadout_sfp_lpvo_chevron per audit.
Trijicon AccuPoint 1-6x24 ships with BAC Triangle / German #4. Default to loadout_sfp_lpvo_chevron (BAC Triangle is the LPVO-defining variant) per audit.
Trijicon AccuPoint 2.5-12.5x42 ships with BAC Triangle / Mil-Dot. Default to loadout_sfp_lpvo_chevron (BAC Triangle is the AccuPoint-defining variant) per audit.

Trijicon Credo 1-8x28 ships with a MRAD Segmented Circle — manual_research per audit. Default to loadout_mil_hash as the closest archetype; the segmented circle is a tactical mil hash with an additional close-quarters aiming circle.
Trijicon Credo HX 2.5-15x56 ships with MOA Center Dot — SFP MOA hash maps to loadout_moa_hash per audit.

Trijicon Tenmile 4.5-30x56 FFP ships with MRAD / MOA Long Range. Default to loadout_moa_hash per audit (MOA Long Range is the primary tactical variant; the MRAD is also a hash-style FFP without flaring tree).
Trijicon Tenmile 5-50x56 ED/FFP ships with MRAD Long Range — FFP mil hash maps to loadout_mil_hash per audit.
Trijicon Tenmile HX 6-24x50 ships with MOA Ranging — SFP MOA hash maps to loadout_moa_hash per audit.
US Optics B-EAST 5-25x52 ships with MGR / MPR. Default to loadout_mil_hash per audit (MGR is the mil variant).
US Optics Foundation 17X ships with MGR / MPR. Default to loadout_mil_hash per audit.
US Optics Foundation 25X ships with MGR / MPR. Default to loadout_mil_hash per audit.
US Optics TS-12X ships with MIL Scale / Mil-D. Default to pd_mil_dot_usmc per audit (MIL Scale is a USMC mil-dot derivative).
US Optics TS-20X 5-25x50 ships with MIL Scale / GenIIXR — the GenIIXR is a modern flaring Christmas tree, maps to loadout_mil_tree_flare per audit.
Vortex Crossfire II 4-12x44 ships with Dead-Hold BDC — SFP hunting BDC maps to loadout_hunting_bdc per audit + Appendix G top-35 verification set (#20).

Vortex Diamondback Tactical 4-16x44 FFP ships with EBR-2C MOA — older simpler FFP mil/MOA Christmas tree, maps to loadout_mil_tree_christmas per audit + README pattern table (EBR-2C → mil_tree_christmas).

Vortex Diamondback Tactical 6-24x50 FFP ships with EBR-2C MRAD — older simpler FFP mil Christmas tree, maps to loadout_mil_tree_christmas per audit + README pattern table (EBR-2C → mil_tree_christmas).
Vortex Razor HD Gen II 3-18x50 ships with EBR-7C MRAD — modern flaring Christmas tree maps to loadout_mil_tree_flare per audit + README pattern table (EBR-7C → mil_tree_flare).

Drift fix: Vortex Razor HD Gen II 4.5-27x56 FFP ships with EBR-7C MRAD — re-mapped from loadout_mil_tree_medium to loadout_mil_tree_flare per Appendix J + Appendix G top-35 verification set (#2 EBR-2C MRAD; this scope ships with EBR-7C which is the flaring variant).
Vortex Razor HD Gen II-E 1-6x24 ships with VMR-2 MOA — SFP LPVO MOA hash maps to loadout_moa_hash per audit.

Drift fix: Vortex Razor HD Gen III 6-36x56 FFP ships with EBR-7D MOA/MRAD — re-mapped from loadout_mil_tree_dense to loadout_mil_tree_flare per Appendix J + Appendix G top-35 verification set (#1 EBR-7D MRAD).
Vortex Razor LHT 3-15x42 ships with HSR-5i MOA — FFP MOA/mil hash maps to loadout_mil_hash per audit (LoadOut-original mil hash archetype is closer to the HSR-5i geometry than the MOA hash).
Vortex Razor LHT 4.5-22x50 ships with XLR-2 MRAD — manual_research per audit. Default to loadout_mil_hash as the closest archetype; the XLR-2 is a FFP mil hash without dense Christmas tree.
Vortex Strike Eagle 1-8x24 ships with AR-BDC3 MOA — SFP LPVO BDC maps to loadout_combat_bdc per audit + Appendix G top-35 verification set (#31 MRAD AR).
Vortex Strike Eagle 5-25x56 FFP ships with EBR-7C MRAD — modern flaring Christmas tree maps to loadout_mil_tree_flare per audit.
Vortex Viper PST Gen II 1-6x24 ships with VMR-2 MOA — SFP LPVO MOA hash maps to loadout_moa_hash per audit.
Vortex Viper PST Gen II 3-15x44 ships with EBR-2C MOA — older simpler FFP MOA Christmas tree, maps to loadout_mil_tree_christmas per audit + README pattern table (EBR-2C → mil_tree_christmas).
Vortex Viper PST Gen II 5-25x50 ships with EBR-7C MRAD — modern flaring Christmas tree maps to loadout_mil_tree_flare per audit + Appendix G top-35 verification set (#3 EBR-7C MRAD).

Zero Compromise Optic ZC527 5-27x56 ships with the MPCT3 — modern flaring Christmas tree per Appendix G top-35 verification set (#10). Re-mapped from the prior loadout_mil_tree_medium to loadout_mil_tree_flare.

Zero Compromise Optic ZC840 8-40x56 ships in MPCT-family Christmas-tree variants. Default to loadout_mil_tree_dense (carried forward from prior mapping); the ZC840 is the long-range body and ships with the MPCT2L/3L variants that are denser uniform-grid trees than the ZC527's MPCT3.
ZeroTech Trace Advanced 4.5-27x50 RMG FFP ships in mil tactical Christmas-tree variants. Default to loadout_mil_tree_medium (carried forward from prior mapping).
ZeroTech Vengeance 4-20x50 SFP ships with a hunting plex reticle — maps to pd_plex. Carried forward from prior mapping.
Vortex Crossfire II 3-9x40 ships with Dead-Hold BDC — maps to loadout_hunting_bdc per Appendix G #27 (LoadOut v2.3 brief) and the "find a reticle resembling yours" launch claim.
Bushnell Engage 3-12x42 ships with Deploy MOA — maps to pd_plex per Appendix G #29 (LoadOut v2.3 brief) since the Engage Deploy MOA is a duplex variant.
Vortex Strike Eagle 1-6x24 ships with AR-BDC3 — maps to loadout_combat_bdc per Appendix G #31 (LoadOut v2.3 brief). LPVO BDC.
Trijicon Credo HX 2.5-15x42 ships with MOA Center Dot — maps to loadout_combat_bdc per Appendix G #32 (LoadOut v2.3 brief). LPVO MOA.
EOTech Vudu 1-8x24 SFP ships with HC3 holographic-style reticle — maps to loadout_combat per Appendix G #23 (LoadOut v2.3 brief).

Hensoldt ZF 3.5-26x56 ships with Hensoldt mil tree (SKMR3 or MR-DOT variants) — maps to loadout_mil_tree_flare per the Phase 6 Appendix G erratum that substitutes 3.5-26x56 for the brief's nonexistent 5-25x56.
ZCO ZC527 ships with MPCT3 — maps to loadout_mil_tree_flare per Appendix G #10 (LoadOut v2.3 brief). FFP flagship mil tree.
Burris AR-332 ships with Ballistic CQ — maps to loadout_combat_bdc per Appendix G #22 (LoadOut v2.3 brief). LPVO-grade BDC for 5.56.

Nightforce ATACR 5-25x56 F1 MOAR-T variant — maps to loadout_moa_tree_flare per Appendix G #12 (LoadOut v2.3 brief). The mil variant lives on the base row nightforce_optics_atacr_5_25x56_f1 mapped to loadout_mil_tree_flare; this is the Option A dual-reticle split per the Phase 5 directive.

Leupold Mark 5HD 7-35x56 TMOA variant — maps to loadout_moa_tree_flare per Appendix G #14 (LoadOut v2.3 brief). The mil (Tremor3) variant lives on the base row mapped to loadout_mil_tree_flare; Option A dual-reticle split.

Leupold VX-Freedom 3-9x40 Boone & Crockett variant — maps to loadout_hunting_bdc per Appendix G #25 (LoadOut v2.3 brief). The duplex variant lives on the base row mapped to pd_plex; Option A dual-reticle split.
